svg.title: Shell Bottom — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Open-Top Half-Box Structure — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
Material: PETG (matte black) | All dimensions in mm | 174 x 200 x 39 mm envelope
SECTION A-A (looking along -X, cut at X=57)
DETAIL D: Rear Pocket Snap Tab
1. All dimensions in millimeters. Tolerances per FDM constraints: 0.2mm clearance for sliding fits, 0.1mm for snug fits.
2. Material: PETG, matte black. Print orientation: open side up (Z=0 on build plate).
3. T-rail lead-in taper: crossbar narrows from 8mm to 6mm over front 15mm (Y=185..200). Not shown in constant cross-section detail.
4. Elephant's foot chamfer: 0.3mm x 45-deg on all bottom exterior edges (Z=0 perimeter).
5. Exterior edge chamfers: 1mm on vertical corners and top rim exterior (except where step joint lip protrudes).
6. Guide bushings: 3 per rod (6 total) at Y=18, Y=85, Y=188. Boss OD 6mm, bore 3.2mm, boss length 8mm (Y).
7. Snap-fit hooks: 12 total (4 left, 4 right, 2 front, 2 rear). Sacrificial support nubs (0.2mm gap) below each hook lip.
8. Mounting plate slots: 4 total (2 per side wall) at Y=82.5..87.5, Z=12..17 (lower) and Z=33..38 (upper).
9. Rear pocket: 4 corner snap tabs retain rear wall plate. Tab positions: (X=16,Z=7), (X=158,Z=7), (X=16,Z=35), (X=158,Z=35).
10. Inset recess (shell bottom portion): X=42..132, Z=24..39, 5mm deep from outer face. Full recess spans Z=24..54 (both shells).
11. Coordinate system: Origin at lower-left-rear corner. X=width (0..174), Y=depth rear-to-front (0..200), Z=height (0..39).
